title: salvia elongata
intro: Salvia elongata, also known as the elongated sage, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, fever, and inflammation due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Salvia elongata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Salvia elongata can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or dried and powdered for later use in remedies, showcasing its versatility in natural medicine.
